warnings: MET does not claim that any change improved the system. Each entry is artifact-backed observation only.
Where before/after evidence is missing, status remains insufficient_evidence or unknown — never a fake improvement.
failure_prevented: Improvement claims being made without paired before/after artifact evidence, which would let regressions hide as 'fixed'.
signal_improved: Each tracked change carries before/after signals, an observed_delta, and an attribution_confidence drawn from artifact-backed evidence — or a visible insufficient_evidence/unknown status.

outcome_entries.failure_prevented: Long-horizon replay coverage remaining partial without owner-evidence pairing.
outcome_entries.signal_improved: Outcome attribution makes the missing after-evidence visible rather than declaring improvement.
outcome_entries.next_recommended_input: Retrieve REP-owned per-dimension replay status with after-state evidence.

outcome_entries.failure_prevented: Fallback reduction being claimed without GOV-side after-state evidence.
outcome_entries.signal_improved: Outcome remains unknown until canonical fallback rows are retrieved post-action.
outcome_entries.next_recommended_input: Retrieve GOV-owned fallback reduction artifact and re-evaluate.
